title: Textile Winding, Twisting, and Drawing Out Machine Setters, Operators, and Tenders
description: Set up, operate, or tend machines that wind or twist textiles; or draw out and combine sliver, such as wool, hemp, or synthetic fibers. Includes slubber machine and drawing frame operators.

tasks.text: Notify supervisors or mechanics of equipment malfunctions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Thread yarn, thread, or fabric through guides, needles, and rollers of machines.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Start machines, monitor operation, and make adjustments as needed.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Inspect machinery to determine whether repairs are needed.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Record production data such as numbers and types of bobbins wound.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Replace depleted supply packages with full packages.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Stop machines when specified amount of products has been produced.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inspect products to verify that they meet specifications and to determine whether machine adjustment is needed.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Tend machines that twist together two or more strands of yarn or insert additional twists into single strands of yarn to increase strength, smoothness, or uniformity of yarn.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Observe operations to detect defects, malfunctions, or supply shortages.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Operate machines for test runs to verify adjustments and to obtain product samples.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Observe bobbins as they are winding and cut threads to remove loaded bobbins, using knives.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Unwind lengths of yarn, thread, or twine from spools and wind onto bobbins.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Adjust machine settings such as speed or tension to produce products that meet specifications.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Study guides, samples, charts, and specification sheets, or confer with supervisors or engineering staff to determine setup requirements.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Tend spinning frames that draw out and twist roving or sliver into yarn.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Remove spindles from machines and bobbins from spindles.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Install, level, and align machine components such as gears, chains, guides, dies, cutters, or needles to set up machinery for operation.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Place bobbins on spindles and insert spindles into bobbin-winding machines.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Tend machines with multiple winding units that wind thread onto shuttle bobbins for use on sewing machines or other kinds of bobbins for sole-stitching, knitting, or weaving machinery.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Repair or replace worn or defective parts or components, using hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Measure bobbins periodically, using gauges, and turn screws to adjust tension if bobbins are not of specified size.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean, oil, and lubricate machines, using air hoses, cleaning solutions, rags, oilcans, and grease guns.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
